commentaries.author: Douay Rheims 1609
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 1:3 So Solomon, and all the congregation with him, went to the high place that was at Gibeon; for there was the tabernacle of meeting of God, which Moses the servant of the LORD had made in the wilderness. Douay Rheims 1609 AND Salomon began to build the house of our Lord in Jerusalem, in mount (a) Moria, which had been showed to David his father, in the place, which (b) David had prepared in the floor of Ornan the Jebusite. (a) This mount Moria, signifying vision, was so named by Abraham, who was there ready to sacrifice his son Isaac Gen. (b) And David, by the appointment of an Angel, offered there sacrifice.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
